channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Woman confronts Ben-Gvir at site of Iranian missile strike
item.description: Israeli woman confronts National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir at the site of an Iranian missile strike in Arad.

item.title: Why the world should worry about Israel’s nuclear doctrine
item.description: The threshold the Israeli authorities have set for the use of a nuclear weapon is dangerously low.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 23 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Trump threatens to hit Iranian energy sites if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened; Tehran vows to retaliate.

item.title: Drone footage shows damage in Arad after overnight Iranian missile attack
item.description: Drone footage shows heavy damage to residential buildings in Arad, Israel, after an overnight Iranian missile strike.

item.title: Trump threatens to ‘obliterate’ Iran power plants unless Hormuz Strait open
item.description: Donald Trump has threatened to 'obliterate' Iran’s power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Casualties as Israeli settlers set fire to homes and cars in West Bank
item.description: Settlers set fire to homes and cars near Jenin amid reports of widespread violence across the occupied territory.

item.title: What we know about Iran’s latest attacks on Israel
item.description: Israel’s air defence system failed to stop at least two Iranian missile strikes on southern Israel.

item.title: Will the Houthis join Iran in war against Israel and the US?
item.description: The Yemeni armed group says all options are on the table.

item.title: Trump issues 48-hour Hormuz Strait ultimatum, threatens Iran’s power plants
item.description: Iran responds to Trump's threat by saying all US energy infrastructure in the region will be targeted if it is attacked.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump threatens to attack power plants over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Donald Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iran's power plants if it fails to open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours.
